title: Man Without a Star
writer: Borden Chase, D.D. Beauchamp, Dee Linford
actors: Kirk Douglas, Jeanne Crain, Claire Trevor
plot: Sharpshooting drifter Dempsey Rae comes back to Wyoming to work for beautiful rancher Reed Bowman. But Reed's plan to fence in her land's wide open spaces angers other ranchers and soon embroils Dempsey in a bloody range war.
